name: Daily Life Mode
description: Find Useful Curiosity patterns around daily hacks, routines, cheap solutions, product use cases, habit fixes, surprising uses, and small lifestyle upgrades.
search_focus: small daily pains with a fast practical payoff
ordinary objects used in surprising but safe ways

safety_rules.description: Analyze only the pattern; do not download or reuse source video.
Habit and lifestyle claims must avoid medical or body-result promises unless reviewed.
Prefer useful, surprising, practical ideas over disgust, humiliation, or shock-only hooks.

curiosity_score.description: How much the hook makes an ordinary problem feel worth watching.

usefulness_score.description: How likely the viewer can apply the idea in daily life.

originality_potential.description: How easily RAIZ can make a fresh example, script, and visual setup.

affiliate_potential.description: How naturally the idea connects to a useful product category without hype.

production_difficulty.description: How hard it is to produce the idea with simple local footage or licensed assets.

rights_risk.description: How likely the idea depends on copied footage, exact phrasing, or creator identity.

brand_fit.description: How well the idea fits RAIZ useful, practical, elegant everyday content.

remake_safety.description: How safely the idea can be remade without unsafe advice or copied assets.
